# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind evolves with AI-assisted practice and cyberpunk battle flavor
- Summary: Showcase CodeGrind's AI-assisted DSA practice and the refreshed Code Breach cyberpunk game within the platform, highlighting new AI capabilities and immersive visuals.
- Slug: codegrind-ai-assistant-and-gaming-evolution
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-ai-assistant-and-gaming-evolution
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-07-04-codegrind-ai-assistant-and-gaming-evolution.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind combines Azure OpenAI-powered assistance with an upgraded Code Breach tower-defense integration to deliver guided, interactive learning. Real-time editor, problem filtering, and immersive visuals bring coding concepts to life.
- CTA: Try the new AI-assisted practice flow and explore the revamped Code Breach visuals today.
- Visual brief: Static showcase image featuring the CodeGrind editor panel alongside a cyberpunk Code Breach game scene, with AI assistant overlay hints and glowing towers representing code concepts.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
